name: Maple Nut Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the nuts.
2. Chop them finely.
3. Process the butter, syrup, oil, and milk until smooth.
4. Add the chopped nuts and pulse to combine.
5. Store in a covered container in the refrigerator.
Makes 1 1/3 cups. (Make honey-peanut with 3 tablespoons honey and no maple syrup)
